# localizedString(forKey:)

**Type Method**

Returns a string containing the localized property name.

## Declaration

```swift
class func localizedString(forKey key: String) -> String
```

## Parameters

- **key**: The address property key. Specify [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddressUsernameKey] or [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddressServiceKey].

## Return Value

A string containing the localized property name.

## Getting Localized Address Information

- **CNInstantMessageAddressUsernameKey**: Instant message address username key.
- **CNInstantMessageAddressServiceKey**: Instant message address service key.
